object: Brain in a Jar / Мозг в банке
production_paths: BrainJarBlockEntity server/client tick, NBT, release and comparator
BrainJarBlock interaction, collision, particle, sound and enchant bonus
BrainJarBlockItem item renderer and item-warp tooltip
closure_notes: XP may exceed 2000 during the absorption tick and is clamped only at the next tick start, matching TileJarBrain.
EatDelay is transient and is no longer serialized; legacy port EatDelay tags are ignored on load.
The universal full-closure prompt is mandatory in the root of this and every future full source archive.
